scope: Classification and recommendation only. No promotion, rewrite, canonicalization, or acceptance.

validation.name: Only the 4 allowed output files created
No move into docs/architecture or docs/technical-specifications

decisions_required: C2 confirm corrected supersedes draft for promotion
C3 rejected program-level Antigravity package stays archive-only / never cited
C4 reconcile sprint-3 capability-governance-design with GOV-005 before reuse
C5 authorize/defer ARCH-001 promotion to docs/architecture + docs/technical-specifications
Record Mermaid CLI version + viewer QA status before promoting rendered diagrams
recommended_next_action: System Architect reviews classification, resolves C1-C5 with Product Owner; ARCH-001 performs any approved promotion. Do not merge or promote based on this task alone.
boundaries: No promotion/rewrite/canonicalization/acceptance; no push to main; no merge; no edit to other agents' branches or governance/runtime files.
